figures.caption: Fig. 3. RMSE and PICP boxplots of trained models on Hair Dryer dataset. For each model, the left boxplot corresponds to SR0, and the right boxplot corresponds to SR1. The horizontal red line depicts the desired coverage.

Fig. 2. Visualization of learned IT2-FSs on the MR Damper dataset (single seed). States are defined with the incremental form (SR1), thus z = [y;∆y;∆2y;u]. Each combined input dimension zi is interpretable: z1 output position, z2 output velocity, z3 output acceleration, and z4 control input.
Fig. 5. RMSE and PICP boxplots of trained models on the Steam Engine dataset; top row corresponds to y1 and bottom row corresponds to y2. The horizontal red line depicts the desired coverage.
